hero.name: Gabriel Borato
hero.tagline: I turn manual processes into one-click automations — or no click at all.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a Senior RPA Developer at Cantu Inc, where I lead the design of our automation framework and architecture standards. Previously at Grupo Koch S.A., I built internal solutions serving 10,000+ employees across TypeScript, React, Node, and Python stacks.
about.p2: My background blends Business Administration with hands-on engineering — I care about software that delivers measurable ROI, not just clean code. I love micro-frontends, CI/CD pipelines on Azure DevOps, and centralized auth (Keycloak, Azure AD, LDAP3).

bullets: Designed the RPA team's development framework, standardizing architecture and best practices.
Owns solution architecture and team backlog management.
Configures and maintains CI/CD pipelines and project governance on Azure DevOps.
Implemented centralized SSO with Keycloak and Module Federation on Next.js micro-frontends.
Architected a TS/React/Python construction-management app integrated with Azure & WhatsApp APIs.
Shipped a TS/React tax-update integration with the ERP, saving 2+ months of yearly team work.
Automated NF-e integration flow with Python, React, AI APIs, and centralized auth for expense auditing.
Built a centralized auth API with Azure AD and LDAP3 (Python).
Developed 10+ internal apps in Node.js, Express, and TypeScript serving 10,000+ employees.
Migrated legacy apps to Docker with horizontal scaling via Docker Swarm.
Built React/TS dashboards integrated with Oracle DB and ERP authentication.
Delivered Python RPA solutions for finance, cutting 1h of manual work per day.
Linux retail environment setup and configuration.
